sentences.target: Im Schlafzimmer ist es heute kalt.

translations.de: Im Schlafzimmer ist es heute kalt.
translations.es: Hoy hace frío en el dormitorio.
translations.fr: Il fait froid dans la chambre aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi in camera da letto fa freddo.
translations.nb: I dag er det kaldt på soverommet.
translations.id: Hari ini kamar tidur terasa dingin.
translations.sv: I dag är det kallt i sovrummet.
translations.da: I dag er det koldt i soveværelset.
translations.ja: 今日は寝室が寒いです。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'in' with the dative article 'dem' ('in dem'); introduces a locative prepositional phrase requiring dative.
Head noun of the prepositional complement to 'im'; neuter, dative singular as governed by the preposition.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject with the predicative adjective; present tense, 3rd person singular.
Expletive/dummy subject in an impersonal, ambient-state clause; nominative singular.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, specifying the time frame.
Predicative adjective functioning as the subject complement of the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Ich lüfte das Schlafzimmer nach dem Putzen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈlʏftə das ˈʃlaːfˌt͡sɪmɐ naːx deːm ˈpʊt͡sən/

translations.de: Ich lüfte das Schlafzimmer nach dem Putzen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈlʏftə das ˈʃlaːfˌt͡sɪmɐ naːx deːm ˈpʊt͡sən/
translations.en: I air out the bedroom after cleaning.
translations.es: Ventilo el dormitorio después de limpiar.
translations.fr: J'aère la chambre après avoir nettoyé.
translations.it: Arieggio la camera da letto dopo aver pulito.
translations.zh-Hans: 打扫完后我给卧室通风。
translations.yue: 清潔完之後我會開窗，讓睡房通風。
translations.pt: Eu arejo o quarto depois de limpar.
translations.he: אני מאוורר את חדר השינה אחרי שאני מנקה.
translations.vi: Tôi mở cửa cho phòng ngủ thoáng sau khi dọn dẹp.
translations.nl: Na het schoonmaken lucht ik de slaapkamer.
translations.hi: सफाई के बाद मैं शयनकक्ष को हवादार करता हूँ.
translations.el: Μετά το καθάρισμα αερίζω το υπνοδωμάτιο.
translations.nb: Etter at jeg har vasket, lufter jeg soverommet.
translations.id: Setelah bersih-bersih, aku membuka jendela supaya kamar tidur terasa segar.
translations.ro: După ce fac curățenie, aerisesc dormitorul.
translations.da: Efter rengøringen lufter jeg soveværelset ud.
translations.ja: 掃除のあとに寝室を換気します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter, marking the following noun as the direct object.
Direct object of 'lüfte'; neuter noun, accusative singular.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article; dative singular, agreeing with the following noun.
Nominalized verb (gerund); head of the PP 'nach dem Putzen' meaning 'after the cleaning'.

sentences.target: Die Katze wartet vor dem Schlafzimmer.

translations.de: Die Katze wartet vor dem Schlafzimmer.
translations.en: The cat is waiting in front of the bedroom.
translations.es: El gato espera fuera del dormitorio.
translations.fr: Le chat attend devant la chambre.
translations.it: Il gatto aspetta davanti alla camera da letto.
translations.ko: 고양이가 침실 문 앞에서 기다리고 있어요.
translations.pt: O gato está esperando na porta do quarto.
translations.he: החתול מחכה ליד דלת חדר השינה.
translations.tr: Kedi yatak odasının kapısının önünde bekliyor.
translations.vi: Con mèo đang chờ trước cửa phòng ngủ.
translations.ar: القطة تنتظر أمام باب غرفة النوم.
translations.nl: De kat wacht voor de slaapkamerdeur.
translations.hu: A macska a hálószoba ajtaja előtt vár.
translations.hi: बिल्ली शयनकक्ष के दरवाजे के सामने इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.el: Η γάτα περιμένει μπροστά στην πόρτα του υπνοδωματίου.
translations.id: Kucing menunggu di depan pintu kamar tidur.
translations.ro: Pisica așteaptă în fața ușii dormitorului.
translations.ja: 猫が寝室のドアの前で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, agreeing with 'Katze'.
Subject noun; feminine, nominative singular.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive, optionally taking a locative PP.
Preposition governing dative in static location; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article; dative singular neuter, agreeing with 'Schlafzimmer'.
Object of the preposition 'vor'; neuter noun, dative singular.

sentences.target: Das Schlafzimmer ist neben der Küche.

translations.de: Das Schlafzimmer ist neben der Küche.
translations.en: The bedroom is next to the kitchen.
translations.es: El dormitorio está al lado de la cocina.
translations.fr: La chambre est à côté de la cuisine.
translations.it: La camera da letto è accanto alla cucina.
translations.pt: O quarto fica ao lado da cozinha.
translations.nl: De slaapkamer ligt naast de keuken.
translations.hu: A hálószoba a konyha mellett van.
translations.hi: शयनकक्ष रसोई के बगल में है.
translations.el: Το υπνοδωμάτιο είναι δίπλα στην κουζίνα.
translations.nb: Soverommet ligger ved siden av kjøkkenet.
translations.id: Kamar tidur berada di sebelah dapur.
translations.da: Soveværelset ligger ved siden af køkkenet.
translations.ja: 寝室はキッチンの隣にあります。
